description_long: This is a small, clear plastic bottle filled with a deep purple liquid, labeled as an açaí shampoo. The bottle has a gently curved, cylindrical body that narrows toward the neck, topped with a dark brown screw cap. The front label features the product name 'AÇAÍ' in large, bold letters, along with additional descriptive text and branding. The back and sides of the bottle display dense blocks of fine print, likely containing ingredients and usage instructions. The bottle's transparent body allows the rich color of the shampoo to be visible, creating a striking contrast with the cap. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A clear, curved plastic bottle with a dark brown screw cap, filled with purple açaí shampoo and labeled on the front and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'AÇAÍ' prominently displayed and clear visibility of the purple liquid inside.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal label text visible, mostly showing the bottle's shape and color gradient.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying a dense block of fine print, likely ingredients or instructions.
description_view_3: Back view with extensive fine print covering most of the label area, and the bottle's curved silhouette.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with gently rounded shoulders and a narrow neck
